creator: guillermo@QuerySoft.es
text:
(In reply to Matthias Andree from comment #5)
"can you start putty from console and see if there is any console output before it crashes? Gtk/Gdk logging, warnings, criticals?  If so, please paste them here."

Hi, Matthias: No, from console there is no other error message but what I pasted before:

Oldno7@Orion:~ putty
Assertion failed: (uc->entry != NULL), function dlg_fontsel_set, file /wrkdirs/usr/ports/security/putty/work/putty-0.78~pre20220922.9fcfd67/unix/dialog.c, line 942.
Abort trap
